challenges.title: Reading & retention lab
challenges.description: Read a short case summary, then answer questions. We study scroll, dwell, and pointer patterns alongside what you remember.

challenges.title: Comparison & choice lab
challenges.description: Compare three fictional offers under a stated business rule, then shortlist one. Dwell, hovers, rescans, and time-to-decision add a decision layer on top of reading skills.

challenges.title: Friction & persistence lab
challenges.description: Routine 'session verification' with bounded waits, one automatic retry, a type-VERIFY step, and a small final nudge. Skip to results is always optional.

challenges.title: Speed & accuracy lab
challenges.description: Twelve quick odd-or-even calls on single digits, with response time and errors captured. A compact speed–accuracy tradeoff signal for the lab, not a clinical test.

challenges.title: Judgment & calibration lab
challenges.description: Five true/false facts plus how sure you are of each answer. The lab reports accuracy, a simple Brier score, and mean confidence vs. outcome—an everyday metacognitive slice, not a formal exam.

challenges.title: Social & risk lab
challenges.description: A fictional product page: ratings, review snippets, expandable warranty, privacy, price, and return details, plus pre-checked add-ons. No real purchase. Built for how people use trust cues and defaults.
challenges.imageAlt: Illustration: demo product page with photo gallery, ratings, and default add-on, for the Social and risk lab.

challenges.title: Search & browse lab
challenges.description: One short lookup: find a demo item with either the search box or three categories. Both work. The lab reports first action (search vs. browse) and whether you used both, for this one task only.
challenges.imageAlt: Search field next to a Browse list, for the Search and browse lab.
